audit_items.proof_trace: Property holds. Both forward path (compute_cells_and_kzg_proofs using IFFT_4096) and reverse path (recover_cells_and_kzg_proofs using IFFT_8192) produce identical coefficients[0..4095] for degree-<4096 polynomials, ensured by FFT/IFFT mathematical properties. Test at tests.c:1897 validates equality via memcmp.
